## [camunda-platform-13.7.1](https://github.com/camunda/camunda-platform-helm/releases/tag/camunda-platform-13.7.1) (2026-04-16)

### Fixes

- Retrieve github app credentials from vault (#5672)
- Use internal cluster url for connectors in console release info (#5767)

### Verification

For quick verification of the Helm chart integrity using [Cosign](https://docs.sigstore.dev/signing/quickstart/):

```shell
cosign verify-blob camunda-platform-13.7.1.tgz \
  --bundle "camunda-platform-13.7.1-cosign-bundle.json" \
  --certificate-identity-regexp "https://github.com/camunda/camunda-platform-helm" \
  --certificate-oidc-issuer "https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com"
```

For detailed verification instructions, check the steps in the `camunda-platform-13.7.1-cosign-verify.sh` file.
